candidate_claims.report_excerpt: Nvidia has delivered a remarkable financial performance over the past three years, with revenue surging from $26.9 billion in FY2023 to $60.9 billion in FY2024, representing a 125.9% year-over-year increase.

candidate_claims.report_excerpt: Nvidia has delivered a remarkable financial performance over the past three years, with revenue surging from $26.9 billion in FY2023 to $60.9 billion in FY2024, representing a 125.9% year-over-year increase.
